data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this compatibility is implemented or functioning as expected. The absence of concrete evidence leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary validations were not performed.
gaps: No evidence of compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
